description: This file defines data schemas and a function to load and validate YAML data files based on these schemas. It includes schema definitions for various data types such as colors, breakpoints, versions, examples, icons, plugins, sidebar, theme colors, and translations, along with a caching mechanism for loaded data.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Loads and validates YAML data files based on predefined schemas, caches the result, and returns the typed data.
